Speakers.Speaker: Duplicating Skill Cards at Inari Shrine

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}By praying at the shrine, you can choose to make a copy of one of your existing Skill Cards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The Skill Card will be replicated immediately. You may do this once per day.[n]{f 1 1}
